lifecycle.note: Approve work items, constraints, and verification before applying edits.

blocks.title: Replace with the code change
blocks.lede: A structured control surface for actual code editing: context, work items, proposed edits, verification, risks, and handoff.

cards.title: Goal
cards.body: State the user-visible outcome and the code boundary.

cards.title: Constraints
cards.body: List compatibility, API, design, migration, dependency, or safety constraints.

cards.title: Verification
cards.body: List the narrowest meaningful commands and smoke checks.

items.statement: Replace with a risk or assumption the agent must preserve.

items.title: Work item one
items.body: Describe the edit, target files, expected patch shape, risks, and verification command.

blocks.title: Editable target snippet
blocks.summary: Use this for small patches, config edits, prompt text, JSON, or other bounded content that should round-trip as an edits packet.
blocks.code:
// old behavior
export const value = false;

blocks.title: Patch set
blocks.summary: Proposed edits grouped by intent, files, linked work items, risk, and verification.

patches.title: Implement work item one
patches.summary: Replace placeholder behavior with the proposed implementation.
patches.diff:
diff --git a/replace/with/file.ts b/replace/with/file.ts
--- a/replace/with/file.ts
+++ b/replace/with/file.ts
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-// old behavior
+// proposed behavior

blocks.title: Full diff preview
blocks.summary: Use a standalone diff-view when the review needs a file-first patch surface.

items.title: Run the narrow unit or typecheck command.
Record changed files and residual risk.

blocks.title: Implementation trust report
blocks.summary: Track which implementation claims are backed by commands, files, or review evidence.

sources.label: Verification command
sources.summary: Replace after running the verification command.
